run_summary.summary: Scanned 11 emails total across two runs today (Apr 20). Key update: the Linkind concept approval is still in progress — after Liz followed up at noon asking if the concept was approved, the platform relayed a new client request at 1:41 PM asking for an approximate time breakdown to confirm the product gets majority of screen time. Liz responded at 2:07 PM with a detailed plan (Top 3 Tips theme, Linkind as #1 tip, lights featured for 50%+ of the video with assembly, app screen recordings, day/night footage). Still waiting on brand's final concept approval before filming. Also: xTool reached out about an in-kind collab for their 80W CO2 Laser (~$10K value) — Liz declined, prioritizing paid deals. No deal created. Prior items unchanged: Bedsure still waiting on Iris, Flexsteel/Popfly enrollment confirmed.

suggestions.message: Liz sent a detailed concept breakdown to the platform at 2:07 PM today — still waiting on concept approval before she can film. The original Apr 15 deadline has passed and no written confirmation of the new deadline exists. Once the platform confirms the concept, she's ready to film same day. If no response by Apr 22, follow up.

Liz sent her rates to Iris (MakeWonder MCN) on Apr 13 and followed up again today. If Iris doesn't reply by Apr 23, it may be worth one more nudge or moving on. The $4,500 bundle quote is on the table.

Flexsteel Phase 3 child card should have next_action_date set to May 13 — that's the filming day at Steinhafels in Downers Grove, IL. Ian accepted the timeline and the agreement deadline is end of May for the 3rd post.

deals.next_action: Follow up on concept approval if no response by Apr 22; ready to film once approved
deals.notes:
[Apr 20 PM]: Brand requested time breakdown per concept — Liz replied with detailed plan: Top 3 Tips theme, Linkind as #1 tip, lights featured 50%+ of video (assembly, app screen recordings, day/night). Awaiting final concept approval.
[Apr 20]: Liz followed up asking if concept was approved — said she can film today.
[Apr 14]: Platform requested detailed content concept by following morning (guidelines in Google Drive). Liz pushed back — requirements too detailed for $2,000 payment, product not yet received, out of town Apr 17–20. Asked platform to have brand email directly if needed.
[Apr 6]: Contract revisions: Liz asked (1) extend posting deadline from Apr 15 and (2) cap revision rounds at 2 max (contract said minimum 2 rounds + reshoot). Platform responded 'no problem' but no written confirmation of new deadline.
[Apr 1]: Contract sent for review by platform.
[Mar 31]: Deal offered via socialmediacollabs.com — $2,000 for 1x 60–90 sec dedicated IG Reel reviewing Linkind SP6 Smart Solar Pathway Lights. Liz accepted same day.
deals.activity_note: Apr 20 PM: Concept still pending — brand asked for time breakdown, Liz responded with detailed plan (Top 3 Tips, lights as #1 tip, 50%+ screen time). Still waiting on approval before filming. Original Apr 15 deadline has passed; new deadline not confirmed in writing.

deals.next_action: Follow up with Iris if no reply by Apr 23
deals.notes:
[Apr 20]: Liz followed up to confirm Iris received rate quote — still no response since Apr 13.
[Apr 13]: Liz quoted $4,500 bundle (1 IG Reel + 14-day link in bio + paid usage rights). Itemized rates: $2,500/Reel + $1,000/30-day paid usage.
[Apr 10–13]: Iris from MakeWonder MCN followed up on paid collab + free Bedsure sheet set offer.
deals.activity_note: Apr 20: New deal created — Bedsure collab via MakeWonder MCN. Liz quoted $4,500 on Apr 13, followed up today with no brand response yet.

deals.next_action: Confirm Popfly enrollment with Ian; film 3rd video May 13-14
deals.notes:
[Apr 20]: Liz confirmed Popfly application submitted (welcome email received). Also applying to Hydroflask campaign on Popfly marketplace.
[Apr 17–20 thread]: 3rd video filming locked for May 13–14 (Kenny's dad has pacemaker follow-up May 11 in Naples). Ian acknowledged and accepted the timeline. Location: Steinhafels in Downers Grove, IL. Agreement deadline = end of May for 3rd video post.
deals.activity_note: Apr 20: Popfly platform enrollment confirmed (welcome email received). 3rd video filming set for May 13-14; Ian accepted timeline. End-of-May deadline for 3rd post per agreement.
